TUBITAK ARDEB 1001 Success of our University

According to the results of the 1st period of 2021 of TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1001, 3 projects led by academicians from our university were entitled to be supported. The details of the projects that received support are as follows:

The project titled “European Green Deal: Threats and Opportunities for Turkey, International Comprehensive and Dynamic General Equilibrium Analysis”, led by Prof. Dr. Alp Erinç Yeldan from the Department of Economics, Faculty of Economics, Faculty of Economics, Department of Administrative, Administrative and Social Sciences, was awarded a grant by TÜBİTAK. In the project, Prof. Dr. Ebru Voyvoda, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Sevil Acar Aytekin, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ebru Voyvoda, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Sevil Acar Aytekin, Assistant Prof. Dr. Ezgi Berfin Ünsal and Guest Researcher Ahmet Atıl Aşıcı.

The project titled “Positioning the Audience in Cinematic Virtual Reality”, led by Faculty of Communication, Department of Radio, Television and Cinema Faculty Member Assoc. Prof. Dr. Melis Behlil, was entitled to be supported by TÜBİTAK. In the project, Dr. Lecturer. Prof. Dr. Elif Akçalı and Dr. Assist. Prof. Dr. Ahu Gökçe is a researcher and Prof. Dr. Albert Ali Salah from Utrecht University is a consultant.

The project titled “Design of Channel Estimation Algorithms for Full Duplex 5G OFDM Communication Systems”, led by Assoc. Prof. Habib Şenol, Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, Department of Computer Engineering, was entitled to be supported by TÜBİTAK. In the project, Dr. Lecturer. Prof. Dr. Atilla Özmen is also involved in the project.
